metadata.description: Marketplace de agentes custom de daycry para Claude Code.

plugins.name: custom-agents
plugins.description: nemesis (auditoría SAST+DAST), evaluator (specs), planner (planes), implementer (ejecuta el plan), pdfy (PDF), qa (E2E Playwright) y documenter (documentación) + commands /pm-cycle, /dev-cycle, /pm-backlog, /roadmap-status y /confluence-pull + skills cybersecurity, to-pdf, confluence-publish, confluence-pull y roadmap-dashboard.
